query: SELECT 'agn_contacts' as tbl, id, name, displayName, notes FROM agn_contacts WHERE name LIKE '%Khanh%' OR name LIKE '%Huynh%' OR displayName LIKE '%Khanh%' OR displayName LIKE '%Huynh%' OR notes LIKE '%Khanh%' OR notes LIKE '%018%' OR notes LIKE '%Node 018%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2GX11Pnc2Gj5TH4.2b4c6ce847b1 --database EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB --execute 
SELECT 'agn_contacts' as tbl, id, name, displayName, notes FROM agn_contacts WHERE name LIKE '%Khanh%' OR name LIKE '%Huynh%' OR displayName LIKE '%Khanh%' OR displayName LIKE '%Huynh%' OR notes LIKE '%Khanh%' OR notes LIKE '%018%' OR notes LIKE '%Node 018%';
